subject: fix(triggers): include clean and improve in start/go sweep sequence
body:
Wrongly excluded cln and imp from the sweep — a full sweep should
include everything. They're now at the end of the priority sequence
(after dbg) since they're lower priority but still part of the sweep.

Tags: documentation, triggers, dx
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: developer-experience
Semver: patch
title: include clean and improve in start/go sweep sequence
